title: Campaign Intake
description: S1 output: campaign intake metadata produced after reading 00-brief.md. Describes generatedAt, briefLength, and status. additionalProperties:true allows persistence of existing dashboard-only fields.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when intake was generated

briefLength.description: Character length of the source 00-brief.md file

status.description: Intake processing status — always intake-complete on success
